TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vajiralongkorn, title = Vajiralongkorn, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vajiralongkorn} }

S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Vajiralongkorn, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Thailand ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Vajiralongkorn ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Vajiralongkorn, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Thailand ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *ajiraloŋkorn rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ajiraloŋkorn, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw tħailan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *ajiraloŋkorn, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
